mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT t.name FROM titles t JOIN user_titles ut ON t.id = ut.title_id WHERE ut.user_id = #{userId} AND ut.is_equipped = true LIMIT 1) as equippedTitle, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_emoticons WHERE user_id = #{userId}) as emoticonCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE user_id = #{userId}) as postCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND parent_id IS NULL) as commentCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND parent_id IS NOT NULL) as replyCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reactions r JOIN posts p ON r.target_id = p.id AND r.target_type = 'POST' WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND r.type = 'LIKE') as totalLikes, ( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reports r JOIN posts p ON r.target_id = p.id AND r.target_type = 'POST' WHERE p.user_id = #{userId}) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reports r JOIN comments c ON r.target_id = c.id AND r.target_type = 'COMMENT' WHERE c.user_id = #{userId}) ) as totalReports FROM DUAL

SELECT 'POST' as type, id as postId, title as content, created_at as createdAt FROM posts WHERE user_id = #{userId} UNION ALL SELECT CASE WHEN parent_id IS NULL THEN 'COMMENT' ELSE 'REPLY' END as type, post_id as postId, content, created_at as createdAt FROM comments WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT '게시글' as targetType, r.reason, p.id as postId, r.status FROM reports r JOIN posts p ON r.target_id = p.id AND r.target_type = 'POST' WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} UNION ALL SELECT '댓글/답글' as targetType, r.reason, c.post_id as postId, r.status FROM reports r JOIN comments c ON r.target_id = c.id AND r.target_type = 'COMMENT' WHERE c.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT id, category, title, created_at as createdAt FROM posts WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'NORMAL' ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'NORMAL'
